prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-S30MMALRS-30MM-BLCK Product Type: LEVEL Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Flatline Ops Scout 30mm Rigid Rifle Scope Bubble Level Precision Shooter Optics Description: LEVEL WHATEVER FIELD YOU'RE PLAYING ON

This rugged no-frills scope level (non-articulating) is Flatline Ops' smallest diameter scope level, fitting 30mm scope diameters. A long-range shot has many factors to take into consideration to be sure you are on target, and our ACCU/LEVEL system aids in the correction of "cant error," giving you dead-on true vertical hold.

Each level is machined from advanced 6061-T6 aircraft aluminum and then black hard anodized to protect it from the extremes of the outdoors. The level is also designed to fit right, or left-handed shooters.


High-visibility fluorescent fluid level is easy to visualize and locate before each shot. Search Terms: 30mm scope level 30 mm bubble level for rifle scope tube long range shooting competition precision shooting optics accessory hunting accessories Features: - Fit Size: 30mm - Width: .625" - Material: 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum - Finish: Black Hard Anodized - Hardware: Stainless Steel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Flatline Ops 30mm Black Rifle Scope Bubble Level

openai.item_name: Flatline Ops 30mm Black Rifle Scope Bubble Level

anthropic.title_differentiation: Corrects Cant Error, 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum, Hard Anodized, Ambidextrous, High-Visibility Fluorescent Fluid

openai.title_differentiation: Machined 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum, Hard Anodized Black Finish, Fluorescent Fluid, Ambidextrous Fit, Stainless Steel Hardware
